question: Jaime Jaquez Jr.: Assists O/U 3.5
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 19 at 10:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Jaime Jaquez Jr. records more than 3.5 assists during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if Jaime Jaquez Jr. records 3.5 assists or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

events.title: Heat vs. Warriors
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 19 at 10:00PM ET:
If the Heat win, the market will resolve to "Heat".
If the Warriors win, the market will resolve to "Warriors".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

question: Series: Nigma Galaxy Kill Handicap (-21.5) vs  Pipsqueak+4 (+21.5)
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Nigma Galaxy and  Pipsqueak+4 in the ESL One Birmingham: Western Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 19 at 10:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Nigma Galaxy" if Nigma Galaxy secures 22 or more kills than  Pipsqueak+4 in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to " Pipsqueak+4".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
groupItemTitle: Series: Nigma Galaxy Kill Handicap (-21.5) vs  Pipsqueak+4 (+21.5)

events.title: Dota 2: Nigma Galaxy vs  Pipsqueak+4 (BO3) - ESL One Birmingham: Western Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Nigma Galaxy and  Pipsqueak+4 in the ESL One Birmingham: Western Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 19 at 10:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Nigma Galaxy" if Nigma Galaxy win the match against  Pipsqueak+4.

This market will resolve to " Pipsqueak+4" if  Pipsqueak+4 win the match against Nigma Galaxy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

question: Will Microstrategy announce a Bitcoin purchase January 20-26?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if MicroStrategy Incorporated announces that they have acquired additional Bitcoin between the dates in the title (from 12:00 AM ET on the first date to 11:59 PM ET on the last date). Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

This market will resolve based on announcements made within the market's designated time frame regardless of when the actual purchases were made.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from MicroStrategy or Michael Saylor.

For reference, MicroStrategy's reported BTC holdings can be tracked at: https://www.strategy.com/purchases

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 21, 1AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: 1H Spread: Hawks (-1.5)
description:
In the first half of the NBA game between Bucks and Hawks, scheduled for January 19 at 1:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Hawks" if the Hawks are winning by 2 or more points at halftime.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Bucks".

The result will be determined based on the score at halftime only.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Bucks vs. Hawks
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 19 at 1:00PM ET:
If the Bucks win, the market will resolve to "Bucks".
If the Hawks win, the market will resolve to "Hawks".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

question: Celtics vs. Pistons: 1H O/U 115.5
description:
In the first half of the NBA game between Celtics and Pistons, scheduled for January 19 at 8:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Celtics and Pistons combine to score 116 or more points in the first half.

question: Game Handicap: JLY (-2.5) vs Kai Lun Gaming (+2.5)
description:
This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between JLY and Kai Lun Gaming in the KPL Growth League Group Stage, scheduled for January 19 at 12:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "JLY" if JLY wins 3 or more games than Kai Lun Gaming in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Kai Lun Gaming".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Series: Dplus KIA Kill Handicap (-13.5) vs Nongshim Red Force (+13.5)
description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Dplus KIA and Nongshim Red Force in the LCK Cup Group Stage, scheduled for January 21 at 3:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Dplus KIA" if Dplus KIA secures 14 or more kills than Nongshim Red Force in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Nongshim Red Force".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
groupItemTitle: Series: Dplus KIA Kill Handicap (-13.5) vs Nongshim Red Force (+13.5)

events.title: LoL: Dplus KIA vs Nongshim Red Force (BO3) - LCK Cup Group Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Dplus KIA and Nongshim Red Force in the LCK Cup Group Stage, scheduled for January 21 at 3:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Dplus KIA" if Dplus KIA win the match against Nongshim Red Force.

This market will resolve to "Nongshim Red Force" if Nongshim Red Force win the match against Dplus KIA.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

question: Ethereum Up or Down - January 20, 2:15AM-2:30AM ET

description:

question: Athletic Club vs. Real Sociedad de Fútbol: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming La Liga game between Athletic Club and Real Sociedad de Fútbol, scheduled for February 1 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Athletic Club and Real Sociedad de Fútbol combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on laliga.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

question: Series: Weibo Gaming Tower Handicap (-10.5) vs Top Esports (+10.5)
description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Top Esports and Weibo Gaming in the LPL Group Ascend, scheduled for January 19 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Weibo Gaming" if Weibo Gaming secures 11 or more towers than Top Esports in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Top Esports".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

description:

This market will resolve to "Satriales" if Satriales win the match against HereWeGoAgain.

This market will resolve to "HereWeGoAgain" if HereWeGoAgain win the match against Satriales.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.sofascore.com/esports.

question: Map Handicap: PGE (-1.5) vs los kogutos (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Pigeons and los kogutos in the NODWIN Clutch Series Play-In Group C, scheduled for January 19 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Pigeons" if Pigeons wins 2 or more maps than los kogutos in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "los kogutos".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Will the highest temperature in London be 7°C or below on January 21?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the London City Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 21 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the London City Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/gb/london/EGLC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

question: Solana Up or Down - January 21, 6AM ET
description:

question: CA Rosario Central vs. CA River Plate: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming Primera División Argentina game between CA Rosario Central and CA River Plate, scheduled for February 1 at 7:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if CA Rosario Central and CA River Plate combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

question: Counter-Strike: Lazer Cats vs EPG Family (BO1) - ESEA Advanced Europe Regular Season
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Lazer Cats and EPG Family in the ESEA Advanced Europe Regular Season, scheduled for January 19 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Lazer Cats" if Lazer Cats win the match against EPG Family.

This market will resolve to "EPG Family" if EPG Family win the match against Lazer Cats.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.sofascore.com/esports.

This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the LaGuardia Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 21 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the LaGuardia Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/ny/new-york-city/KLGA.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

question: Map Handicap: ex-RUBY (-1.5) vs Metizport (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Metizport and ex-RUBY in the European Pro League Series 4 Group A, scheduled for January 21 at 6:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "ex-RUBY" if ex-RUBY wins 2 or more maps than Metizport in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Metizport".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Series: Invictus Gaming Kill Handicap (-9.5) vs Top Esports (+9.5)
description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Invictus Gaming and Top Esports in the LPL Group Ascend, scheduled for January 21 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Invictus Gaming" if Invictus Gaming secures 10 or more kills than Top Esports in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Top Esports".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Invictus Gaming and Top Esports in the LPL Group Ascend, scheduled for January 21 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Invictus Gaming" if Invictus Gaming win the match against Top Esports.

This market will resolve to "Top Esports" if Top Esports win the match against Invictus Gaming.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 21, 7AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

description:
In the upcoming NHL game, scheduled for January 19 at 7:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Wild" if the Wild win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Maple Leafs".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Wild vs. Maple Leafs
events.description:
In the upcoming NHL game, scheduled for January 19 at 7:30PM ET:
If the Wild win, the market will resolve to "Wild".
If the Maple Leafs win, the market will resolve to "Maple Leafs".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods and shootouts. In the event of a shootout, one goal will be added to the winning team's score for the purpose of resolution.
